name: example-mcp
description: TEMPLATE: Replace with a one-line description of your MCP server. E.g.: 'Gotify notification server MCP bridge for Gemini CLI.'
author: Jacob Magar

settings.name: server_url
settings.description: Base URL of the MCP HTTP server. Keep http://localhost:40060 for local use; set to https://example.yourdomain.com for a remote server. Do NOT include a trailing /mcp.

settings.name: api_token
settings.description: Bearer token for MCP HTTP authentication. Every request to /mcp includes: Authorization: Bearer <token>. Generate one with: openssl rand -hex 32

settings.name: example_api_url
settings.description: TEMPLATE: Replace 'example_api_url' with your service's credential field name. Your upstream service API endpoint — the URL this MCP server calls to fetch data. Maps to EXAMPLE_API_URL env var.

settings.name: example_api_key
settings.description: TEMPLATE: Replace 'example_api_key' with your service's credential field name. API key or bearer token for your upstream service. Maps to EXAMPLE_API_KEY env var.
